recommendations.title: Ricky & Barabba
recommendations.overview: A wealthy millionaire decided to commit suicide but meets a homeless with whom he experiences a lot of funny adventures until finally makes order in his life.

recommendations.title: Firefighters
recommendations.overview: In the barracks of the "Settecamini" fire brigade in Rome, the shabby Squadra 17 tackles missions with resounding failures, waiting in vain for a chance for redemption.

recommendations.title: Amici Come Prima
recommendations.overview: Cesare Proietti is the esteemed manager of the Relais Colombo, a luxury hotel in Milan. When a group of new Chinese business partners want to revolutionize everything, the hotel owner's daughter, Luciana, decides to fire Cesare. When Cesare discovers

recommendations.title: The Disappearance of Haruhi Suzumiya
recommendations.genres: Animation, Comedy, Science Fiction, Mystery, Drama
recommendations.overview: A week before Christmas, Kyon wakes up in a world where the SOS Brigade doesn't exist. Mikuru and Yuki don't recognize him, and Haruhi and Itsuki seem to have vanished.

recommendations.title: The Brigade
recommendations.overview: Bénédicte Meursault, a female firefighter, has just been transferred to a small fire brigade in the South of France. She is welcomed by Philippe, 45, the wise captain of the brigade. Soon after being introduced to the men, the young woman jumps into

recommendations.title: The Price of Family
recommendations.overview: Heartbroken that their children no longer want to spend time with them, two parents fake an inheritance to bring the family together for Christmas.

recommendations.title: There's Still Tomorrow
recommendations.overview: In postwar Rome, a working-class woman dreams of a better future for herself and her daughter while facing abuse at the hands of her domineering husband. When a mysterious letter arrives, she discovers the courage to change the circumstances of her l

recommendations.title: Foxfire
recommendations.overview: The story of five teenage girls who form an unlikely bond after beating up a teacher who has sexually harassed them. They build a solid friendship but their wild ways begin to get out of control.

recommendations.title: L'Atalante
recommendations.overview: Newly married couple Juliette and ship captain Jean struggle through marriage as they travel on the L'Atalante along with the captain's first mate and a cabin boy.

recommendations.title: The Tiger Brigades
recommendations.overview: The film, set in 1912, is about the exploits of France's first motorized police brigade.
